display.description: Generates one or more images from a text prompt using OpenAI's image generation API (DALL·E 2, DALL·E 3, or GPT image models). Note: streaming and partial images are not supported by this activity.

display.name: API Endpoint URL
display.description: Endpoint URL for the OpenAI API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1

display.name: OpenAI API Key
display.description: OpenAI key that is required to authenticate with the OpenAI API

display.name: Model
display.description: Model to use. Defaults to dall-e-2. Most other parameters depend on this choice.

display.name: Number of Images
display.description: How many images to generate. Allowed range 1-10 for dall-e-2 and gpt-image*. dall-e-3 only supports 1.

display.name: Size
display.description: Image dimensions. dall-e-2: 256x256 | 512x512 | 1024x1024. dall-e-3: 1024x1024 | 1792x1024 | 1024x1792. gpt-image: 1024x1024 | 1536x1024 | 1024x1536 | auto. gpt-image-2 also accepts arbitrary WxH (multiples of 16, AR 1:3-3:1, max 3840x2160).

display.name: Quality
display.description: Model-specific. dall-e-2: leave empty (parameter not supported). dall-e-3: standard | hd | auto. gpt-image*: low | medium | high | auto.

display.name: Style
display.description: dall-e-3 only. 'vivid' or 'natural'. Leave empty for dall-e-2 and gpt-image*.

display.name: Response Format
display.description: dall-e-2/3 only. Mutually exclusive with Output Format. URLs valid for 60 minutes.

display.name: Output Format
display.description: GPT image models only. Mutually exclusive with Response Format.

display.name: Background
display.description: GPT image models only. 'transparent' requires Output Format png or webp.

display.name: Output Compression
display.description: GPT image models only, 0-100. Only applies when Output Format is webp or jpeg.

display.name: Moderation
display.description: GPT image models only. Content moderation level.

display.name: End-User Identifier
display.description: Unique identifier representing your end-user (helps OpenAI detect abuse).

display.name: Created
display.description: Unix timestamp the response was created.

display.name: Background
display.description: Background of the returned image (GPT image models).

display.name: Image Data
display.description: Array of generated images. Each entry contains b64_json, url, and/or revised_prompt.

display.name: Usage
display.description: Token usage information (GPT image models only).
